title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 35s Fast Heat-Up Vertical Steaming | Ceramic Soleplate & Adjustable Temperature | 460ml Water Tank with 0.7g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 2000W Purple
features: ✅ POWERFUL 2000W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 35 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ CERAMIC SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a ceramic soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (20g/min) or steam burst (0.7g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 460ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 460ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 20g/min and a steam boost of 0.7g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.

✅ SAFETY & SELF-CLEANING FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe. The built-in self-cleaning function helps prevent limescale buildup, maintaining optimal performance and extending the iron’s lifespan.
description: Product Description POWERFUL STEAM BURST Provides precision steaming across small and large garments and steam boost for tough creases. VARIABLE TEMPERATURE CONTROL You can easily adjust the temperature according to the fabric type by moving the rotatable temperature control. CERAMIC SOLEPLATE The Ceramic plate will ensure a smooth and soft glide of the iron over the fabric. 220ML WATER TANK Large water tank capacity, Filling it completely, you can iron a large number of clothes without adding extra water.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Continuous Steam Technology, Self-Cleaning, Spray & Steam Burst Setting, Steam Boost Function, Vertical Steaming
